zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre於大約1120年出生在法國帕-德-卡拉斯阿拉斯時，他的父親Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras27歲，母親Clémence d'Oisy19歲。他於大約1151年與Adelaide de Saint-Pol在法國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1191年1月10日在巴勒斯坦منطقة الشمالعكّا享年72歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bethune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre was born about 1120, in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, was 27 and his mother, Clémence d'Oisy, was 19. He married Adelaide de Saint-Pol about 1151, in France. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 10 January 1191, in Acre, Northern, Palestine, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre est né environ 1120, à Arras, Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Clémence d'Oisy, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide de Saint-Pol environ 1151, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1191, à Acre, Northern, Palestine, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre um 1120 in Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras 27 und seine Mutter Clémence d'Oisy 19. Er hat um 1151 in Frankreich Adelaide de Saint-Pol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1191 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Acre, Northern, Palästina.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre è nato il circa 1120 nel Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Clémence d'Oisy, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide de Saint-Pol circa 1151, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1191, nel Acre, Northern, Palestina, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acreが約1120年にフランスプアス-デ-カレイスアラスで生まれた時，父Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arrasは27歳，母Clémence d'Oisyは19歳であった。約1151年にフランスでAdelaide de Saint-Polと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1191年1月10日にパレスチナمنطقة الشمالعكّاで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre(이)가 대략 1120년 프랑스 파스-데-캘레이 아라스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Clémence d'Oisy(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1151년 프랑스에서 Adelaide de Saint-Pol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1191년 1월 10일 팔레스타인 منطقة الشمال عكّا에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Arras, Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Clémence d'Oisy, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide de Saint-Pol aproximadamente 1151, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1191, em Acre, Northern, Palestina, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre родился около 1120 г. в местности аррас, пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Clémence d'Oisy, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide de Saint-Pol около 1151 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 10 января 1191 г. в местности عكّا, منطقة الشمال, Палестина в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Bethune V,  Crusader, seigneur de Béthune, Richebourg, Warneton, Chocques, avoué d'Arras, Died at seige of Acre nació aproximadamente 1120, en Arras, Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Guillaume I Bethune , Sieur, de Béthune, de Richebourg, de Varneston, Avoué, d'Arras, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Clémence d'Oisy, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Adelaide de Saint-Pol aproximadamente 1151, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1191, en Acre, Northern, Palestina, a la edad de 72 años.
